long-title: We know more about the health of some groups of people than others.

help-solution: Teachers for speakers of othr languages able to teach reading counting and money skills alongside English
help.help-delivery: Accredited training accessed Face to Face or online

outcomes: People having better understanding of reading, writing, counting and money management
People being able to use health and social care systems
People able to understand more about their health
assessment: *We will know how many people have been trained
*People will manage their health conditions better
*People will be happier with the services they receive
*People will have fewer worries about money
one-year-outcome: *Health and local authority / social care organisations will know about health literacy
three-year-outcome: *People will manage their health conditions better
*People will be happier with the services they receive
*People will have fewer worries about money

active-projects.project-description: Health Literacy Place is a free online resource to help organisations and individuals improve health literacy. It includes information, tools, resources and training to support the development of health literacy in the UK.
